_provenance: Calibrated by examples/calibrate_empirical.py via non-negative least squares of per-term ΔΔG deltas against experimental values. PRELIMINARY: fit on 11 barnase (1BNI) point mutations only; recalibrate against ProTherm/SKEMPI for production use. hbond and elec went to zero — the coarse, angle-free forms of those terms did not improve the fit on this set and need a larger, charge-rich training set before trusting them.
